---
title: "Mechanism Design"
short-title: "Mechanism Design"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "VCG mechanisms, Myerson's optimal auction, and the revelation principle."
keywords: ["mechanism design", "VCG", "Myerson", "revelation principle", "incentive compatibility"]
---

# Mechanism Design {#sec-mechanism-design}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
